title_working: Madoff: The Biggest Ponzi Scheme in History
warnings: Owner continued the money/financial-fraud direction after FTX (Ep.4) and explicitly delegated the Ep.5 topic choice to Claude (2026-06-19). Series so far: Miranda(1) -> Gideon(2) -> Mapp(3) -> FTX/SBF(4) -> Madoff(5).

R1 (DOWN from FTX R2): Madoff is DECEASED (2021) and pleaded GUILTY (2009) -> lower defamation risk. Still: no real-person likeness (anonymous silhouettes only); all money figures sourced to court records / SIPA trustee / SEC filings before script lock; living non-defendants (family, employees, whistleblower, regulators) described neutrally by role.
Differentiation from FTX must stay sharp: FTX = crypto-exchange software backdoor; Madoff = classic paper Ponzi (new deposits pay old 'returns'). Keep the 'hidden system' spine.

ANGLE LOCKED v002 (owner delegated 'おすすめで', 2026-06-19): Madoff is an over-covered story, so the angle is deliberately differentiated. Protagonist = the impossibly perfect, never-down return CHART as the smoking gun ('too steady = red flag', a takeaway the viewer can use). Human spine = the whistleblower ignored by the SEC for ~9 years (hero vs sleeping watchdog). Myth-correction payoff on the famous $65B (fabricated value vs ~$17.5B principal). Visual identity: faceless, dark/gold noir, NO pink.
Thumbnail/visual rule: hero motif is the perfect rising return curve; NO pink anywhere; no real-person likeness (silhouettes only).
